# KRONATRIX AI — Full Brand and Service Summary

## What KRONATRIX is
KRONATRIX AI is a London-based website and AI-visibility business. It creates and improves fast, mobile-friendly websites for businesses, authors, creators and personal brands.

## What KRONATRIX does
KRONATRIX makes a brand easier to understand by clearly explaining who it is, what it offers, who it helps, why it can be trusted and what a visitor should do next. Work can include website design, positioning, content structure, headings, metadata, schema, FAQs, internal links, page speed and conversion paths.

## Core areas
- AI SEO: website and content clarity for Google and AI-assisted search.
- GEO: Generative Engine Optimisation, focused on making information easier for generative systems to understand and use when relevant.
- AEO: Answer Engine Optimisation, focused on direct, answer-first content.
- AI search visibility: structured information that is easier to crawl, compare and summarise.
- Author websites: personalised author and book-promotion websites.
- Marketing websites and GPT resources: clear pages and tools designed to turn attention into action.

## Contact
Email: kronatrix.ai@gmail.com
Location: London, United Kingdom
Availability stated on the official website: open 24/7.

## Honest positioning
No ethical provider can guarantee a specific Google ranking, ChatGPT mention, Gemini recommendation or AI citation. KRONATRIX improves the signals it can control: entity clarity, useful content, proof, crawlability, structure, metadata, schema, internal linking, speed and conversion clarity.

Last updated: 2026-07-11
